about.description: We use cookies and similar technologies on our website and process personal data of visitors to our website (e.g. IP address), e.g. to personalise content, to integrate media from third-party providers or to analyse access to our website. Data processing only takes place when cookies are set. We share this data with third parties that we name in the settings. Data processing may be carried out with consent or on the basis of a legitimate interest. Consent can be given or refused. There is a right not to consent and to change or withdraw consent at a later date. Please note our {legal} and additional information regarding the use of personal data in our {policy}.

banner1.title: Your Sound, Elevated
banner1.description: Immerse yourself in rich, crystal-clear audio with our cutting-edge headphones. Designed for the ultimate listening experience, whether you're a casual listener or an audiophile. Discover the perfect blend of style, comfort, and sound quality that elevates your music to new heights.

banner2.title: Drone Omega
banner2.description: A lightweight drone designed for stunning aerial footage. With a high-resolution camera on a 3-axis gimbal and up to 45 minutes of flight time, it's perfect for capturing smooth, stable video. Featuring GPS-assisted hover, obstacle avoidance, and easy portability, the Drone brings innovation and simplicity to your aerial shots.

welcome.pretitle: Welcome to your new favorite shop
welcome.title: Discover Tech & Style
welcome.subtitle: Innovative technology meets modern fashion
welcome.paragraph1: Welcome to our shop, where tech enthusiasts and fashion lovers alike will find exactly what they're looking for! From premium headphones and high-performance drones to stylish clothing, we offer everything to make your life smarter and your style unique.
welcome.paragraph2: Our mission is to provide you with a carefully curated selection of products that combine quality, innovation, and design. Whether you're in search of a new speaker for perfect sound or a casual hoodie to complete your look – we've got you covered.

textcard.title: A New Listening Experience
textcard.subtitle: Innovative technology meets modern fashion
textcard.paragraph: Our headphone collection sets new standards in audio precision. With deep bass, crystal-clear highs, and an impressive soundstage, these headphones deliver a unique listening experience for every music genre. Combining modern design, maximum comfort, and cutting-edge technology, they are the perfect choice for anyone who refuses to compromise on sound quality.

fashion.title: Discover our fashion collection
fashion.subtitle: Sporty fashion and accessories for everyone.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.description: Be aware of upcoming sales and events. Receive gifts and special offers!

textWidgetDesc: With their multiple award-winning, proven design, EzyRoller are true pioneers in terms of riding fun and quality! Thanks to high-quality materials and technology, they are extremely durable and quiet. If you have any questions or are interested in distributing our products, please contact us via our
os4: Our Ezyroller journey began 20 years ago when our 2-year-old son hopped on a little ride-on toy that had us instantly captivated. Without any chains or batteries, he was cruising along in a continuous curving motion created by his little hands pushing side to side on a hand bar. The movement was genius - and the fun he was having was huge.
os5: Digging a bit deeper, we discovered it was just one of many toys using the same ‘rider-generated’ forward motion, known as cambering. The ride-on toys were all clearly designed for youngsters – but we could already see the potential for something new and different with much wider appeal. The seats, frames, look and overall stability of the existing ride-ons revealed an opportunity to redesign and recreate!
os6: And so began our mission to come up with a superior ride-on experience using the same ingenious cambering motion but topping it with something totally new. We wanted improved strength, stability, smoothness of motion, and a racier, cleaner look that would appeal to kids of all ages.
os7: What followed was a solid year of testing and tinkering, with each change being put through its paces by the toughest toy critics around – the kids in our neighbourhood. Every new tweak to this ride-on toy was tested along our driveway by our three boys, the neighbours’ kids, their friends, and their friends’ friends.
os8: Eventually we arrived at what would become our flagship product, the Ezyroller Classic. The kids immediately loved it – it was tough and sturdy, it was racy, and it glided along beautifully. It was also extendable, meaning the kids could keep rolling with it as they grew. But best of all, we noticed all the cool, inventive play going on - the kids would be racing, chasing or towing each other, chalking the pavement, throwing each other balls, even jousting with their plastic swords!
os9: Since the launch of the Ezyroller Classic our team has continued to add to the range, with each new version fulfilling our mission to improve, diversify and add new levels of fun to the Ezyroller experience. Every show, every test, every factory visit, every discussion is an opportunity to find new ways to be better. We’ve since developed the Ezyroller Drifter (for our more adventurous riders), the Mini (to better suit our littlest riders) the Pro (to get big kids in on the action) and our X series (with a new twist on the original look). We’ve also introduced a range of game accessories for those riders with a more competitive streak!
os10: Today, Ezyroller boasts an award-winning range of models and accessories suitable for every age, size, personality and skill level. Whether you’re a racer or a cruiser at heart, want to shoot a few hoops, hit hockey shots or just invent games of your own, there’s no limit to the fun!
os11: We won our first awards in 2007 when we presented our Classic model in the US and we just won our 27th one in July 2024 for our Spinner X!
osdesc: For more than 20 years, EzyRoller has created ride‑on vehicles that grow with your child and deliver smooth, playful motion. Discover our story and what inspires us.
faq3: Child safety is our top priority. That’s why we ask all children and their parents to carefully read and follow our safety instructions. Parental supervision is always required when children ride their EzyRoller to ensure all safety rules are observed. Always wear a helmet and appropriate protective gear when using your EzyRoller.
faq4: Adult assistance is required during assembly: the packaging contains small parts that pose a choking hazard for children under 3 years of age.
faq5: Ensure all parts and packaging are kept out of reach of children. Keep fingers and body parts away when folding, unfolding, or adjusting the size. Also, make sure fingers, hands, hair, and clothing do not come into contact with the wheels while using the EzyRoller.
faq6: Never use your EzyRoller near cars, traffic, pools, or in areas with limited visibility. Slopes, stairs, hills, and swimming pools are off-limits.
faq7: The EzyRoller is designed for use on flat, clean, dry surfaces where the movement mechanism works optimally. The brake is not intended to stop the EzyRoller at high speed. Doing so may cause excessive wheel wear that would require replacement and could compromise the EzyRoller’s stability.
faq8: Here you’ll find a list of frequently asked questions. If you don’t find the answer to your question, you can always email us at info{'@'}ezyroller.de. Always remember: child safety comes first, and children should never use the EzyRoller unsupervised near vehicles.
faq11: We handle your data with care. You can find more details in our Privacy Policy.
faq13: Like other comparable fun vehicles, the EzyRoller is powered by a side-to-side “wiggle” motion. A simple left-right movement, performed with the feet on the footrest, propels the vehicle forward, mimicking the slithering of a snake. If you look at the tracks left by an EzyRoller, you’ll notice the resemblance to snake trails.
faq14: Which surfaces does it work on?
faq15: The EzyRoller works on most surfaces except grass, sand, gravel, or uneven terrain. Thanks to its highly durable polyurethane wheels, it can also be used on thick carpets.
faq16: Does it need a slope to move?
faq17: No. The EzyRoller is designed for flat surfaces. We do not recommend using it on sloped terrain, as it is not intended for that purpose. Riding downhill may also cause premature wheel wear due to frequent braking.
faq18: From what age can my child ride an EzyRoller?
faq19: Children can start riding the EzyRoller Mini as early as 2 to 3 years old. For all other models, please read the description carefully. Each model has been safety-tested up to 210 kg. For normal use, we recommend a maximum rider weight of 70 kg.
faq21: Initially, the EzyRoller was assembled in a garage in New Zealand, but production soon moved to Asia. While manufacturing there is more cost-effective, the main reason was that no New Zealand manufacturer had the technical capacity to produce the EzyRoller. Workers at our partner factories may be young, but we ensure no child labor is involved and conduct monthly checks. No matter where it’s produced, you receive the quality you pay for—this is non-negotiable. The factory in China produces to ISO9001 standards and has over 20 years of experience in making comparable products. In China, we can achieve higher product quality than in New Zealand, where production costs are much higher and capabilities more limited, which would otherwise result in a lower-quality product.
faq22: Do you have game suggestions for the EzyRoller?
faq23: Children’s imagination has no limits. With the EzyRoller, kids can unleash their creativity, playing alone or with friends. Our game suggestions are divided into activities for one EzyRoller and games that require multiple EzyRollers.
faq24: Is there a warranty on the product?
faq25: Yes. All EzyRollers come with a two-year warranty from the date of purchase. This does not cover wear parts such as wheels or grips, nor does it cover damage caused by a car. The EzyRoller is not suitable for sloped terrain. Premature wear caused by riding on uneven surfaces and excessive braking is not covered under the warranty.
faq27: Yes. We offer all necessary spare parts for every EzyRoller in our shop. If you can’t find something, please contact us at info{'@'}ezyroller.de
faq29: The simplest and still super exciting: EzySlalom
faq30: What you need: A large flat area (tennis court, sports ground), some plots (sports cones, balls...) for the course, a chronometer to time your mates.
faq32: Place the cones on the ground and set a start/finish line
faq33: Place yourself behind the start line
faq34: Slalom between the obstacles without touching them
faq35: The winner is the one that is fastest at crossing the line without touching the obstacles. Depending on the difficulty of the course you can incur penalties for touching the obstacles. How to improve: Find the best trajectory first before focusing on speed. Variants: You can have a team against another one, trying to make a relay and see who is fastest. When you touch, you go around the obstacle. You can go around the block as fast as possible and time yourself!
faq36: Games With Multiple EzyRollers: EzyHockey game
faq37: What you need: a large flat area (tennis court, sports ground...), 2 teams of 3 kids at least. More if you have a big court, some goal posts, a ball.
faq38: Make 2 even teams. Like at hockey or soccer, you can pass the ball directly. Score in the post. How to improve: Try to have a defense and attack team with more a specialized striker. Variants: If you have a small hockey set then use a smaller ball. You can throw the ball backwards. Use American football rules with a quarterback!
faqdesc: Find answers to the most common questions about EzyRoller. Clear information about our products, sizes, features and models.
ercaredesc: EzyRollers require minimal maintenance: simply protect them from rain and direct sunlight to keep them smooth and durable. Our uncompromising quality standards include a 2‑year frame warranty from the date of purchase.
ercare4: At EzyRoller, we aim to keep maintenance as low as possible. Complicated care? Forget it! Just remember to protect your EzyRoller trike scooter from rain and direct sunlight – this will keep it smooth, stylish, and ready to ride for years. Our high-quality standards ensure effortless fun and long-lasting elegance.
ercare6: The frame of your EzyRoller comes with a 2-year warranty from the date of purchase. This does not cover wear-and-tear parts such as seats, wheels, or grips, improper care, or damage caused by accidents, e.g., if the trike is run over by a car.
ercare7: Most EzyRollers are made primarily from steel. Despite a strong powder coating, rust can develop if scratches are not protected and the vehicle is exposed to rain or high humidity outdoors.
ercare8: The EzyRoller is designed for flat, smooth surfaces, not slopes. Using the brake on inclines can wear down the wheels quickly – this is not covered by the warranty.
textWidgetP1: At EzyRoller, we don’t just create trikes – we craft riding experiences. Our award-winning range is designed to make every ride smooth, exciting, and unforgettable. Imagine gliding effortlessly, powered solely by the rhythm of your own movements.
textWidgetP2: From the Mini for little explorers to the Drifter Pro X for thrill-seeking teens and adults, there’s a ride for every age and energy level. Looking for adventure? The Drift Trike turns your ride into a 360° spin of fun, while the Drifter X tackles corners like it was built for the racetrack. And when it’s time to take things up a notch, our awesome accessory kits – from hockey sets to snow gear – keep the action going.
textWidgetP3: Durable, stylish, and endlessly fun – EzyRoller is more than just a kids’ vehicle. It’s movement perfected. Ready to roll?
textWidgetSizeD: Which Ezyroller is right for your kids (and you!)
findEzyrollerDescription: Which EzyRoller model is the best fit for your child (or for you!)
sgC2: Which size fits your child best (or you!)
sgC3: Our EzyRollers are designed to grow with your child. Thanks to our innovative extension systems, each model offers multiple sizes and adjustable features. From Classic and Classic X to Mini, Drifter, Pro and their X‑Series versions, there is a perfect ride‑on for every size, age and skill level.
sgT12: Every rider is different, but the Mini is our smallest seat and frame. It is ideal for children around 13–20 kg (30–45 lbs) and a height of approx. 78–83 cm up to 93–100 cm. Beyond that, the Classic model will likely be a better fit. We generally recommend the Mini for children aged around 2 to 4 years.
sgT22: Every rider is different. We usually recommend the Classic model for children from around 100 cm (about 4 years old). The Classic comes with 2 extensions so it can grow with the child up to around 14 years and beyond.
sgT23: The Classic X is a new version of the original Classic: same size, but with new features – a sleeker shape, reinforced seat and new hand and foot grips.
sgT32: We recommend the Spinner for children from around 100 cm (about 4 years old). It comes with 2 extensions so it can grow with them up to around 14 years and beyond.
sgT33: The Spinner X is our brand‑new model. Imagine a ride‑on that glides like a snake and spins like a dancer – pure 360° fun!
sgT42: The Drifter is generally suitable for children from around 120 cm (about 6 years old). It includes 2 extensions so it can grow with them up to around 14 years.
sgT43: The Drifter X is the same size but offers new features: more comfort thanks to the ergonomic seat, and a sportier feel with new grips and seat cover.
sgT52: The Pro X is usually recommended for children from around 135–140 cm (9–10 years). One extension ensures the vehicle grows with them up to around 16–17 years.
sgT62: The Drifter Pro X is also suitable for children from around 135–140 cm (9–10 years) and grows with one extension up to around 16–17 years.
sgT63: With its new X‑Series seat, accessories and drift mechanism, the Drifter Pro X is fast, comfortable and perfect for bigger kids who love curvy rides.
sgT64: Discover the EzyRoller Drifter Pro X

homeDescription: Explore the full range of EzyRoller ride‑ons and accessories from the official store. Fast delivery, trusted quality and models for every age group.
